title: post api auth sign up email
description: Test user registration with valid email, password, and name to receive a successful response with user and session data.

title: post api auth sign in email
description: Test user login with correct email and password to receive user and session data; also test login with incorrect password to receive 401 invalid credentials error.

title: post api auth sign in otp
description: Test OTP sign-in flow by sending a valid OTP for a registered email and receiving user and session data.

title: post api auth send verification otp
description: Test sending OTP verification email to a valid email address and receiving success confirmation.

title: post api auth sign out
description: Test signing out with a valid session cookie to receive success confirmation and verify session destruction.

title: get api auth session
description: Test retrieving current session information with and without a valid session cookie to verify session presence or null.

title: get api dashboard
description: Test fetching authenticated user's profile data with valid session cookie and verify 401 unauthorized response without authentication.

title: get api settings
description: Test retrieving user settings with valid authentication and verify unauthorized access without session.

title: put api settings
description: Test updating user settings including name and email alert toggle with valid authentication and verify validation and unauthorized errors.

title: post api endpoints
description: Test creating a new monitored endpoint with valid data and session cookie, and verify validation errors and unauthorized access.
